title: Virtual Try-On Identity Lock
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for changing outfits while preserving a synthetic model's face, body, skin tone, hair, and posture identity.

en.title: Virtual Try-On Identity Lock
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for changing outfits while preserving a synthetic model's face, body, skin tone, hair, and posture identity.

zh-CN.title: 虚拟试衣身份锁
zh-CN.description: 测试只换服装，同时保持合成模特脸、身形、肤色、发型和姿态身份不漂移。
